inputDescription: Upload one SVG file or paste SVG markup. Processing stays in your browser.
chooseSvgLabel: Drag and drop an SVG here, or click to upload
uploadHint: Use clean source when possible; the optimized output can still be inspected before download.
supportedFormatsLabel: Only .svg files and image/svg+xml content are supported.
optionsDescription: Choose a safe preset or tune individual SVGO passes before optimizing.
multipassDescription: Run SVGO more than once to catch optimizations that appear after earlier cleanup.
removeCommentsDescription: Strip XML comments and editor notes that are not rendered.
removeMetadataDescription: Drop metadata blocks from design tools and export pipelines.
cleanupIdsDescription: Shorten generated IDs and remove unused references.
convertColorsDescription: Normalize colors to shorter equivalent forms when possible.
removeDimensionsDescription: Remove width and height attributes when viewBox can preserve scaling.
inlineStylesDescription: Inline matched styles into elements. This can shrink simple exports but may change complex styling.
resultDescription: Compare file size, preview the output, copy the optimized SVG, or download it.
emptyResultDescription: Add an SVG source and run optimization to see the compressed output.
onlyOneFileError: Only one SVG can be processed at a time.
readError: Failed to read the SVG file.
invalidSvgError: The input does not look like SVG markup.
optimizeFailedError: Unable to optimize this SVG. Check the markup and option combination.
copyFailedError: Unable to copy the optimized SVG.
